parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, slug: $json.out_slug, current_count: $json.out_current_count, target: $json.out_target, batch_added: $json.out_batch_added, done: $json.out_done, parse_stats: $('Parse & Validate Messages').first().json.parse_stats, usage: $('Parse & Validate Messages').first().json.usage }) }}
